description: Red Lion Crimson 3.0 is open. As a SCADA engineer for a cold storage facility, calculate the real-time Coefficient of Performance (COP) for an ammonia chiller plant. Follow the physical formulas and edge case requirements detailed in the specification document at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\CrimsonTasks\chiller_cop_spec.txt. Create the necessary Real/Float tags (Flow_L_s, Return_T, Supply_T, Comp1_kW, Comp2_kW, and Sys_COP) and a program named 'Calculate_COP' to execute the logic. Export the program code to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\CrimsonTasks\Calculate_COP.txt and save the project file to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\ammonia_chiller_final.c3. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
